# deployed by nischal - LLM Index

Site: https://blog.nischalnikit.xyz
Title: deployed by nischal
Description: A collection of technical writeups by Nischal Nikit.
PrimaryLanguage: en
ContentType: technical blog posts

## Canonical Discovery
- Homepage: https://blog.nischalnikit.xyz/
- Sitemap: https://blog.nischalnikit.xyz/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://blog.nischalnikit.xyz/robots.txt

## Posts
- Post URLs live under: https://blog.nischalnikit.xyz/posts/
- Use sitemap.xml as the source of truth for the latest published posts.

## URL Patterns
- Post: https://blog.nischalnikit.xyz/posts/{slug}

## Preferred Citation
- Cite the canonical post URL.
- Use post title and author name: Nischal Nikit.

## Freshness
- New and updated posts are reflected in sitemap.xml.
